channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Kansas remains No. 1 in AP poll, top 10 shuffled with losses by 3 teams; Wisconsin joins rankings
item.description: Kansas strengthened its grip on No. 1 in the AP Top 25. The rest of the top 10 turned into a jumble of teams swapping places. The Jayhawks picked up five first-place votes in The Associated Press men's college basketball poll released on Monday, receiving 49 from a 61-person media panel. No.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Suzuki and Sabathia among 14 newcomers on baseball Hall of Fame ballot. Wagner tops holdovers
item.description: COOPERSTOWN, N.Y. (AP) — Outfielder Ichiro Suzuki and pitcher CC Sabathia are among 14 new candidates on the Hall of Fame ballot released Monday, joining 14 holdovers led by reliever Billy Wagner.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Triathlete with terminal cancer completes Ironman championship
item.description: An Ironman is a test of endurance featuring a 2.4-mile swim, a 26.2-mile marathon run, and a 112-mile bike ride.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Raiders' Brock Bowers and other NFL players celebrate TDs with Trump-inspired dance moves
item.description: The Trump dance is becoming a trend around the NFL. Raiders tight end Brock Bowers, Titans wide receiver Calvin Ridley and Lions defensive end Za’Darius Smith followed Nick Bosa’s lead and celebrated big plays on Sunday with dance moves inspired by President-elect Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NBA fines Hornets star LaMelo Ball $100K for anti-gay comment during postgame interview
item.description: Charlotte Hornets do-it-all point guard LaMelo Ball was fined $100,000 for making an anti-gay comment during his postgame interview after beating the Milwaukee Bucks.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Blackhawks place defenseman Seth Jones on injured reserve with right foot injury
item.description: VANCOUVER, British Columbia (AP) — The Blackhawks placed defenseman Seth Jones on injured reserve Saturday with a right foot injury. The 30-year-old Jones had played in each of Chicago's first 17 games, going into Saturday's loss in Vancouver, averaging more than 25 1/2 minutes of ice time.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Trump attends UFC championship fight in New York, taking break from Cabinet picks
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump walked out to a roaring standing ovation just ahead of the start of the UFC pay-per-view card at Madison Square Garden on Saturday night, combining two things close to his heart: fierce battles inside the octagon and New York City.
item.dc:creator: Will Weissert, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Mountain West closes investigation into allegations against San Jose State trans player without discipline
item.description: The Mountain West Conference has said it concluded an investigation into allegations against San Jose State volleyball player Blaire Fleming.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Nuggets star Nikola Jokic and coach Michael Malone miss game against Pelicans for personal reasons
item.description: The Denver Nuggets were without star center Nikola Jokic and coach Michael Malone for their NBA Cup opener Friday night against the New Orleans Pelicans.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Former Detroit Lions player charged over Capitol riot
item.description: A former Detroit Lions linebacker was arrested and charged with allegedly assaulting law enforcement and other offenses over the Jan. 6, 2021, Capitol riot, according to the Department of Justice (DOJ).
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, WGN 9

item.title: Garrett Crochet named AL Comeback Player of the Year
item.description: Chicago White Sox pitcher Garrett Crochet was named American League Comeback Player of the Year after a successful season as a starting pitcher, striking out 209 batters over 32 starts.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Yankees name Dave Sims new radio play-by-play voice
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- The New York Yankees have officially named a new play-by-play voice. Veteran broadcaster Dave Sims will replace John Sterling, who says he’s officially retired for good after a brief return to call playoff games.
item.dc:creator: Kate Rooney, PIX 11

item.title: Bucs TE Cade Otton emerging as reliable target for Baker Mayfield in absence of injured receivers
item.description: Cade Otton is showing the rest of the NFL the type of offensive weapon the Tampa Bay Buccaneers always felt he could become.
item.dc:creator: FRED GOODALL, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Tampa Bay Rays to play 2025 season at Yankees' spring training field
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rays will play their 2025 home games at the New York Yankees' nearby spring training ballpark amid uncertainty about the future of hurricane-damaged Tropicana Field, Rays executives told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: CURT ANDERSON Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Finally healthy, Puka Nacua poised for strong finish
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - Puka Nacua was not supposed to be this good, this quickly. As a fifth round draft pick out of BYU by the L.A. Rams in 2023, Nacua took the NFL by storm, setting rookie records with 104 catches for 1,486 yards.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: USC women’s basketball team beats Cal State Northridge by 85 points
item.description: The USC Trojans women’s basketball team was not messing around Tuesday night, shattering the team record for most points scored in a single game. Led by standout JuJu Watkins (21 points, nine assists, six steals), the Trojans beat the Matadors of Cal State Northridge by a score of 124-39.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Collins scores 29, but Jazz fall to Suns, 120-112
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Jazz got big contributions from John Collins and rookie Kyle Filipowski, but it wasn't enough to slow down the Phoenix Suns Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU ranked 6th in College Football Playoff poll
item.description: PROVO, Utah (AB4 Sports) - It was one of the most thrilling victories in BYU history, and will go down as a true rivalry classic. But perhaps what was even more thrilling for the Cougars than their 22-21 win over Utah Saturday night, was the reception they received late Saturday night in Provo.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Dodgers fan claims he was fired for calling in sick, attending World Series parade
item.description: People are willing to go to great lengths to support their beloved sports teams—one person even lost his job for it. A Los Angeles Dodgers fan claims he was fired after being spotted at the team's World Series victory parade after calling in sick for work.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Bears fire offensive coordinator Shane Waldron
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. — The Chicago Bears have fired offensive coordinator Shane Waldron. The club has promoted passing game coordinator Thomas Brown to offensive coordinator.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Mitchell scores 36 as the Cavs beat the Bulls 119-113 for 12th straight win
item.description: Donovan Mitchell scored a season-high 36 points, and the Cleveland Cavaliers beat the Chicago Bulls 119-113 on Monday night to become the eighth NBA team to begin a season with 12 straight wins.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Dodger Stadium improvements could provide leg-up in team's pursuit of World Series repeat
item.description: Work has begun at Dodger Stadium, including renovations to the home team clubhouse, which houses team lockers, showers and communal areas.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, Fox 5

item.title: Bucs with Bowles looks at team's frustrating record entering the bye week
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers have reached their bye week, banged up, two games under the .500 mark, and trailing in a division race that may require the Bucs to be perfect for the remainder of the season.
item.dc:creator: Dan Lucas, WFLA, NBC
